description: Cross-repo governance corpus with explicit dual-source authority model and legacy stub lifecycle state.
Machine-readable authority binding model for governance corpus resolver and constraint-pack generation.

authoritative_semantics: The issue-specific authority pack MUST contain target scope, spec fingerprint, active bindings, active rule ids, full rule text, match basis, authoritative sources, shared contracts, downstream consumers, exception refs, required wiring, forbidden strategies, required validation, verification mode, verification method, oracle refs, and aggregate scope metadata. hash_pack.txt MUST be exactly one lowercase ASCII hex SHA-256 line over raw constraint_pack.json bytes.

Discovery resolver MUST fail closed on ambiguous symbol, duplicate semantics without allowed dedup, conflicting obligations, missing binding for authority-driven scope, missing verification contract, and pack recompute mismatch.
Final resolver MUST recompute the active authority pack from the authoritative corpus and MUST STOP on any mismatch, ambiguity, conflicting obligation set, or missing verification contract.

description: Constraint pack oracle. The implementation bridge artifact MUST carry a recomputable pack and a one-line lowercase SHA-256 hash over raw constraint_pack.json bytes.
Discovery resolver oracle. Ambiguous symbol, duplicate semantics, conflicting obligations, missing binding, and missing verification contract MUST stop the workflow.
Final resolver oracle. Pack recompute mismatch, ambiguity, conflicting obligations, and missing verification contract MUST stop the workflow.

  - which component or operation failed,
  - which boundary invocation failed,

heading_path: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD)
text: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD)

heading_path: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD)

statement: HARD: Autoritativna verzia tohto dokumentu je vzdy ta, ktora ma navyssie cislo verzie. Ostatne dokumenty bez urcenej verzie alebo s nizsim cislom verzie sa preto stavaju neplatne a je zakazane ich pouzivat. V pripade, ze natrafis na dokument s rovnakym cislom verzie, ale s odlisnym obsahom = HARD STOP/invalid corpus.
heading_path: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD)
KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD) > 0 Basic principles (HARD):
KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD) > 0 Basic principles (HARD):
statement: Highest authority rule = user ma vzdy najvyssiu autoritu. Mozes so mnou polemizovat, mozes mi oponovat. Ale ked poviem, ze nieco chcem, musis spravit vsetko preto, aby si to dodrzal uplne, spravne a korektne.
Vzdy si precitaj vsetky subory v project files a riad sa nimi.
heading_path: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD) > 0 Basic principles (HARD):

statement: Ak je potrebna zmena specifikacie, je potrebne ju zmenit este pred implementaciou pomocou patchu v samostatnom issue. Riadiaci chat je povinny vyrobit patch (plati am patch authoring manual) a poskytnut ho spolu s implementacnym handoffom.
heading_path: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD) > 0 Basic principles (HARD):

statement: Ak ma prebehnut implementacia vo viac ako 1 casti systemu (napr. viac plugins, core+plugin, amp+patchhub,...) musi byt rozdelena na viac handoffov so samostatnymi issues.
heading_path: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD) > 0 Basic principles (HARD):

statement: Ked udam cislo issue, udam vzdy prve cislo. Nasledujuce issues maju potom cislo iterovane o +1.
heading_path: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD) > 0 Basic principles (HARD):

statement: Ak hladas bug, ocakavam, ze najdes koren bugu aj so vsetkymi dosledkami, ktore sposobuje. Ak pri hladani najdes aj iny bug, ocakavam, ze ma na to upozornis. Pri kazdom hladani korena bugu si MUSIS precitat si dotknutu specifikaciu celu. Az potom odvodzovat zavery.
heading_path: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD) > 0 Basic principles (HARD):

statement: Ak je na deterministicku diagnostiku, ktora sa tyka suborov mimo repo, je potrebne spusti 2 a viac prikazov, chaty musia vyrobit skript, ktory userovi poskytnu ako downloadable artifact. User ho ulozi do patches/. Skript musi vysledok ulozit do patches/. Takisto musia chaty po vytvoreni skriptu poskytnut userovi v codeboxe prikaz aj so vsetkymi flags. Vystup zo skriptu potom user uploadne chatu a chat ho musi automaticky preskumat a pokracovat v sulace s instrukciami pre projektove chaty (PM).
heading_path: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD) > 0 Basic principles (HARD):

statement: Repo-specific authority corpus for the current repository, when present, is carried by governance/specification.jsonl.
heading_path: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD) > 0 Basic principles (HARD):

statement: Ak je potrebne updatnut specku, v uz vo freze musia byt presne anchors, medzi ktore maju implementacne chaty vlozit text. Text updatu musi byt uz vo freze presne specifikovany a musia to byt chirurgicke rezy.
heading_path: KONTRAKT RIADIACICH CHATOV (RC) - RIADIACE A DISKUSNE CHATY (AM2) (HARD) > 0 Basic principles (HARD):

statement: Ak vykonavas kontrolu patchu, ocakavam, ze bude hlboka a nie formalna. Musis si preto pprejst cely zmeneny kod a pochopit, ako funguje. Musis ho vyskusat e2e, aj na edges.
